title: Rathbunia dumortieri
taxonomy: Rathbunia dumortieri is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Argentina. Rathbunia dumortieri is a member of the tribe Heliantheae. The plant is a perennial herb that produces small, yellow flowers. It is also known as the Argentine daisy or yellow daisy.
